price: Free download with optional leaf Pro subscription
core_innovation: LeafEngine — a prose-rhythm analysis engine that ensures every vertical page or swipe ends on a completed thought or logical paragraph break, inducing deep reading flow.

reading_modes.name: Glide
reading_modes.description: A smooth vertical slide with a gentle snap to logical paragraph breaks.

reading_modes.name: Leaf
reading_modes.description: A traditional page-curl animation that reduces screen motion and marks reading progress.

reading_modes.name: Stream
reading_modes.description: Continuous vertical scrolling, still logically segmented by the LeafEngine.

icloud_book_vault.description: iCloud Book Vault is the preferred original-file surface for readers who want book files available through iCloud Drive and the Files app. Large original book files can remain in iCloud Book Vault instead of being uploaded through leaf Pro sync.

leaf_pro_sync.description: leaf Pro is an optional account-backed sync service for library metadata, reading progress, annotations, journals, shelves, covers, and supported book files. It is designed to sync reading state without adding feeds, streaks, ads, or behavioural analytics.

local_fallback.description: If a reader does not use iCloud Book Vault or leaf Pro sync, leaf can keep imported files locally in the app's documents storage.

data_collection: leaf does not use ads, behavioural analytics SDKs, reading streaks, or a social feed. If a reader enables leaf Pro sync, leaf stores the account, subscription status, library metadata, reading progress, annotations, journals, shelves, covers, and supported book files needed to provide sync. Large original files can remain in iCloud Book Vault.

curated_library.description: Hand-vetted LEAF Editions of classic literature.

aesthetic: Warm oatmeal-paper background (#f4f1ea) with minimalist layout, significant white space, and digital silence.
feature_list: LeafEngine prose-rhythm analysis for intelligent page breaks
Three reading modes: Glide, Leaf, Stream
iCloud Book Vault for original book files
Optional leaf Pro sync for metadata, progress, annotations, journals, shelves, covers, and supported book files
EPUB, PDF, Markdown, and .leaf bundle import support
Zero ads, zero behavioural analytics, zero reading streaks
Privacy-conscious reading model with local storage, iCloud Book Vault, and optional account-backed sync
Hand-vetted LEAF Editions of classic literature
